description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages versionBumpGradle, build, checkFormatting, and release, using the mjalas/javafx Docker image by default and setting GRADLE_OPTS to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false and a before_script that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME=`pwd`/.gradle. Add a version job in the versionBumpGradle stage that runs on releases but not tags, uses the registry.gitlab.com/juhani/go-semrel-gitlab:v0.13.1 image, executes `release next-version --allow-current > .next-version` and then `sed -i -e "s/version '[0-9].[0-9].[0-9]'/version '$(sed 's:/:\\/:g' .next-version)'/g" build.gradle`, and stores build.gradle as an artifact. Add a build job in the build stage that runs `./gradlew --build-cache assemble`, caches the build and .gradle directories keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME with push policy, and uploads the build/libs/ directory as an artifact that expires in one day. Add a checkFormatting job in the checkFormatting stage that runs `./gradlew spotlessCheck` and pulls the same cache. Add a release job in the release stage that runs on releases but not tags, uses the same go-semrel image, and runs `release changelog` followed by `release commit-and-tag build.gradle CHANGELOG.md`.
